string 2:
Make sure you look after me, okay? Otherwise, I just might 
have to play my pipes here...
Wanna try controlling me with them?
I dunno... For some reason, I get the feeling it wouldn't work...
What do they sound like?
Actually... I don't know. Everyone hears them differently.
Don't worry. I'll watch over you.
...Yeah, you're right. I know you'll take good care of me.
You're all I care about.

Even without playing my pipes...? Wow, thanks! I'll take 
good care of you, too.
Where do ya wanna go? If I can go there, I'll take ya!
Somewhere no one's ever been to before.
You wanna go on an adventure? A brave request... but, okay!
Somewhere I don't know about yet.

The world's a big place, huh? Bet we can learn lots by 
going to different places!
Anywhere, if it's with you.

Hehe. It's kinda embarrassing when ya say it out loud... 
but I feel the same way!
A place where you can rest.
Hehe. Thanks. Just you saying that gives me strength!

Now that I can shoot lightning, you might get shocked 
if you touch me.
I'm not afraid of a little shock.

You really are a brave one, huh? I could learn a few things 
from you.
I'll wear rubber gloves.

And that would protect you from lightning? Huh. You learn 
something new every day.
You'd never do anything mean like that.

Haha. There's no fooling you, huh? Yeah, don't worry. 
I'd never shock you.
You already electrify me.
Wow, listen to you! What a character you are! Hehe!
My left hand is so big now... Are you scared of me?
Not at all.

Aw, I was hoping you'd be at least a little spooked... But thanks. 
I'm glad I asked.
No, but it is pretty interesting.

Oh... I guess I do have more to learn, too... about myself, 
and how to protect everyone.
More like reassured that I can count on you.

Really? Hehe. Well, I'm counting on you, too. Let's use this 
hand of mine to save everyone!
It looks cool.

What?! R-Really? Now I'm feeling kinda self-conscious.
Hehe...

The other day, I saw a flower garden full of roses. 
It was really beautiful.
Let's make weapons out of all the thorns.

Haha. Like the ones I have? True. These thorns do pack a 
prickly sting!
Let's gather the petals for a bath.

You mean put the petals in the water? Huh. I never thought 
of using them that way.
Let's go see it together.
Sure, I'd love to! And I'm gonna hold you to that promise!
I'd like to give all the roses to you.

Um, would that really suit me...? Still, that's very nice 
of you to say. Thanks.
I think I wanna do something mean to you.
Be mean to me and I'll be mean back.
Figured you'd say that. You're ready for anything, aren't you?
What are you gonna do?

I'm not telling. Besides, I can't just come up with these things 
outta nowhere, you know.
Please don't.

Doing it even if you say not to is the whole point. But I guess 
I can skip it for today...
That isn't like you.

Trying to talk me out of it? Sorry, but once you catch my eye, 
it's gonna happen.
Is your heart pure?
Nope. Sorry.

You might be joking, but I suggest you mend your ways. 
I cannot abide an impure heart.
It might be a little impure.

Very honest of you. But think carefully. If you feel that way, 
purity is not far off.
Probably.

So you have some doubt within you? I shall help you rid 
yourself of this uncertainty.
Of course it is.
A bold claim. But do not worry. I believe you.
Which do you prefer, birds or fish?
Both are kind of meh...

Are you perhaps not a fan of me? Once you hear my song, 
I bet you'll change your tune.
Fish!

A fan of the sea? You'll be happy to know it feels incredible 
to sing in the ocean depths.
I like both.

Then I imagine you'll like my peculiar look. I feel like singing 
a song, just for you!
Birds!

In that case, allow me to serenade you from the skies with 
my avian trill.
How about it? Coming aboard?
I bet I'd get motion sickness.

I'd strive to keep turbulence to a minimum, so please 
overcome your trepidation.
I don't do well with smoke.

I'm really careful with humans on board. I wouldn't blow 
too much smoke, you know.
Can you take me somewhere nearby?
Near or far, I promise you a smooth and pleasant journey.
Let's travel to the ends of the earth!

Very well. It'll be a long journey for sure, so I won't slack off 
on the maintenance.
I must inflict divine punishment upon those who commit evil deeds.
Sounds a little harsh to me...

I imagine those receiving the punishment feel the same. 
That is why I judge carefully.
I say condemn the offense, not the offender.
But of course. I always judge good and evil without sentiment.
I support divine punishment!
As well you should. I do hope you never end up being judged.
I wish you didn't have to.

Perhaps I feel similar. Nothing would please me more than 
if my duty was no longer needed.
Have my emotions bubbled to the surface?
Too much, if you ask me.

Clearly, your judgment is off. I calmly judge the need for severe 
punishment, nothing more.
Yeah, I'd say so.

I understand if you think so. Still, calmly talking like this is 
proof of my composure.
Not at all.
It seems you understand the dispassion of my rage.
You're pretty calm, actually.
Precisely! It seems you understand the composure behind my wrath.
I'm willing to go to any lengths to achieve victory.
Winning is important.

My victories defend the peace of the Digital World. I could 
really use your help, too!
Sometimes you have to lose to win.

I'm defending the Digital World here, so your logic doesn't jive. 
Victory is everything.
Isn't that against the rules?

Please understand that if it means saving the Digital World,
I'm prepared to break any rule.
Win or lose, it's best to try to get along.

Maybe when it comes to you, but some in this world can only 
be stopped with force.
I am not suited for a throne.
Then hand it over!
That is hardly something for a human to jest about. Foolhardy, indeed.
That's not true.

It may appear that way to you, but the vagabond life suits me. 
It has much to offer.
You were made for it.

Even if that were true, I am your ally now. I have no time to 
attend to a throne.
Hand it to someone else, then?

Sure, if I meet someone worthy of it. Perhaps they will cross 
our path on this journey.
We must protect the beautiful seas.
I feel the same way.

Feelings are certainly important, but we need action. Not that 
I have to tell you that.
How do we do that?
There is much for us to do. Shall we mull over the matter together?
I'd like to help.

That is reassuring. Surely a bright future awaits us, with the 
help of humanity.
You should leave it to me.

I appreciate the sentiment, but this is my duty. But yes, let us 
work together.
Spending time with a human isn't too shabby.
You may think so for now.

My, is that right? Well, if you have another side to show me, 
hurry up and do it already.
It doesn't tire you out?

Not at all! I enjoy learning about your daily routine. Here's to 
learning even more!
Aren't you just saying that to be polite?

You're the one being standoffish and overly polite. Let's just 
be real with each other.
Let's stay together forever.

I intend to do just that, of course. I can't imagine myself away 
from you at this point.
You have some growing up to do.
I wanna grow up.

Just thinking it won't achieve anything. Keep a level head and 
take it one step at a time.
I can't grow up.

Can't you? I don't mean physical maturity, but mental. It's 
all a matter of attitude.
Don't treat me like a kid.

Can you say with confidence that you're more grown-up than 
me? Something tells me no.
I'm already there!

Saying that just proves you're still a kid. Still, I like your 
innocent, childish side.
Am I hot?
Not really.

Perhaps I lack zeal? It seems I must redouble my training
regimen.
You are.

It must be the hot blood boiling in my veins, though I do try 
to rein it in.
Too hot.

In light of my role as a deity, I suppose I should take that as a 
compliment. My thanks.
Sweltering.

I apologize if the heat is uncomfortable, but I must not let my 
fervor as a deity waver.
Am I... cold?
Not really.

Well, be forewarned, because there are times when I can be
perceived as such.
You are.

Surely not all the time, though? It must seem that way because
I shoot arrows of ice...
Too cold.

Is that what you think?! I embrace others with a warm heart at
times, you know!
You seem cold and lifeless.

Is that how I look? That can't be helped, but please take note
of my other side as well.
Grr...! I'm so busy I don't have enough hands to deal with it all!
Well, now you're just being greedy.

I never have enough to do my best work, but I am certainly
blessed. Better put 'em to work.
Those should be more than enough.

True. Eight might work with the right design. Better put my 
nose to the grindstone.
Shall I lend you a hand?

Friendship's all I really need. With eight limbs, I'll pay it back 
four times over!
How many more do you even need?

The more the merrier, if you ask me! Still, you're good with the 
two you've got, right?
I will never miss a single move you make.
Thanks. Keep a close eye on me!

Certainly. But bear in mind that I see all—what lies on the surface, 
and within.
Don't look at me.

Whether I intend to look at you or not, I observe everything there
is to see about you.
Do you have to stare so intently?

I promise I am not staring. However, know that I am always
watching over you.
Can you really see me?

Perceiving you with my mind, as opposed to my eyes, allows
me to see the true you.
Tell me what kind of fruit you like!
Fruit with a rich aroma.

Wine from such fruit makes me drunk on the scent alone... 
I get quite generous as well!
Sweet fruit.

Such fruit makes mellow brews when fermented. 
I'd love to try a few out!
Sour fruit.

I love the crisp acidity of wines from such fruit. Let's have a 
drinking contest!
Juicy fruit.

Wines from juicy fruit are tangy and go down easy, especially 
with a good story!
Am I... the jealous type?
Not at all. You're compassionate and kind.

I am honored you think so highly of me. I shall have to keep 
my jealousy in check...
Of course not.

It is a relief to hear that. Still, I wonder what your basis 
for saying that is...
Don't worry about it.

That response only worries me more. Still, I appreciate 
your kindness.
You're a green-eyed monster.
I see... I shall be careful not to get too attached to you.
What is wrong with being jealous?
Nothing, that's what.

Then I shall surrender to this yearning. Please keep your 
eyes fixed upon me.
It's a waste of your beauty.

But consider this. If you cannot meet the person you love, what
is the point of beauty?
It causes trouble for everyone.
At the very least, I shall be careful not to cause you any trouble.
It makes everyone pull away from you.

I fear that is unavoidable. Keep your eyes on me, exposed 
for all to see.
Is there nowhere I can enjoy a captivating singing voice?
It's not gonna be easy.

I suppose not... But I shall not give up, so please help me
search.
Why not search from the sky?

I intend to do so, naturally. Let us listen together from the
heavens!
Want me to sing for you?

I appreciate the thought, but I seek a truly captivating voice, 
not merely human singing.
Let's search together.
I thank you. We shall soar the wide heavens together.
Are you not hungry?
I wanna gather some nuts.

Take the blessings of Gaia with gratitude. Collect too many
and disaster may strike.
I'm full.

Yes, you seemed as though you might be. So this is how a 
contented human looks.
Are you offering me something?

I have the fruits of Karpos Hulē here, but they may not suit 
the human palate.
I'm starving.

Poor thing. Were you a Digimon, I could help, but I am afraid 
I can do nothing. Forgive me.
Are you afraid of me?
You're amazing.

Too much flattery will be your ruin. Horror and violence ought 
to be feared properly.
Yeah, you're scary.

If you lack sin or evil worthy of the underworld, you have 
nothing to fear from me.
I'm not afraid.

Of the underworld? I would not send a human like you to that 
realm in the first place.
I'm not scared, but you're a fearsome sight.

Though both human and Digimon would agree, an ally is an ally. 
You shall not be my prey.
Are there any fresh, juicy DigiCores around here?
Let's go look together.

I hardly expected that response... It seems you are prepared to
gaze into the abyss with me.
I have no idea.

Your friends appear to have some nice DigiCores...
But I suppose you, a human, were not the one to ask.
Even if there were, I wouldn't tell you.

Teasing me, are you? Your friends will end up forfeit at this rate.
But for now, training.
Please exercise some self-restraint.

I suppose I must forbear, now that we are allies.
Take me on a trip so that I might at least forget such things.
Have you any interest in traveling the galaxy?
I'd love to.

Set your thoughts racing to new worlds, and once day your
dreams will become reality.
What kind of place is it?

The superspace within me is difficult to describe, but it will show 
you new worlds.
Can I breathe there?

The galaxy of the Digital World may differ from that of your own,
but I shall aid you.
No, I'm good.

So you say, but I, myself, am a galaxy. Thus, you have already
set forth on the journey.
Think you can keep up with my super speed?
Easily.

Glad to hear it, because racing around the Net all alone
gets boring. Now, let's go!
Where are you in such a hurry to go?

I want to go from one end of the Net to the other and show you
the entire Digital World!
Not interested in trying.

Then clear the way. I don't want to crash into you and smash
you to smithereens.
You're too fast.

Speed is everything to a machine. I'm only going to get faster,
so you better keep up!
Combat is a cruel, painful thing.
Let's fight together.

Seems your resolve is steeled. Now that we are comrades, 
our hearts and minds are one.
We should avoid it.

The battle to purge evil is unavoidable, but I would be happy 
to hear any plan you have.
Trust me. I know.

You, too, have seen your fair share of carnage. I would like to 
hear your stories someday.
It isn't cruel or painful.

I suggest you drop the bluster. Instead, allow me to support 
the needs of your heart.
I'm crazy tough, huh? So are all my pals!
You're good at running and hiding.

...Wh-What?! Maybe you haven't heard, but it takes guts to know 
when to run for it!
You're sneaky.

Say whatever ya want! Me and my pals are just fightin' smart, 
that's all!
Yeah, maybe.

Then just be glad we're on the same side. I always look out for 
my friends.
More like pretty weak.

If that's what ya think, then keep me safe. I mean, we're pals, 
right? Right?
What? I look pissed? I'm in a great mood, I tell ya!
All I can see is an angry mug.

I'm in the best mood when I'm pissed! Rile me up more and 
I'll send somebody flyin'!
In that case, let's sing.

Dummy! This ain't no time for a ditty! I fight tough guys when 
I'm in a good mood!
I mean, yeah, obviously.
Right? I'm so happy, it's infuriatin'! I wanna send some joker flyin'!
Then smile, why don't you?

I AM smilin', dangit! What do ya think this is comin' outta my 
face, a long sneeze?!
You workin' out?
What should I do?

How 'bout swingin' around a bone club like me? That'll put some 
muscle on ya.
I wanna work out with you.

Ya ain't on my level, kid. Humans gotta work out human-style. 
Ya get me? Think about it.
I am.

Don't look that way, but I guess it ain't fair to compare anybody 
with my jacked bod.
Not at all.

Then how're ya gonna defend yourself? But meh. Ain't like I wouldn't 
jump in to help.
Hey, pal, youse shakin' from the chill?
It's freezing. Warm me up.

How about youse and me have a li'l throwdown? My Snow Punch's 
got a spicy bite to it.
I'm cold, but I'm not shaking.

Then lemme tell ya somethin' nice. Runnin' wild like me gets
yer blood pumpin'!
I don't mind it being a little nippy.

Nice, nice. How about youse put ice on yer shoulders like me? 
It makes good weapons.
Of course! This cold is bone-chilling.

What a lazybones. Why not take a jog, warm up yer body? I'll
even join ya fer a few laps.

You're always real good to me. Hehe. Guess that means you're
a fan of mine!
Acting too full of yourself will make me mad.

Ooh, sooo scary! But this isn't what you're really like when you're 
mad, is it?
But what if I have some ulterior motive?

Huh? I didn't think about that... Hmm. Why exactly are you so
good to me?
Y-You've got the wrong idea.

Hehe. Well, I'll leave it at that... But no reason not to do my best
for my partner!
Yeah, you're awesome!

Uh, yeah... Thanks. It's kinda embarrassing when you just come
out and say it like that.
The bones of the defeated are mine to claim.
How cruel.

Just erasing the fallen may be more merciful, but it is my duty 
to collect their grudges.
Sounds like a nice memorial service.

Oh? I take possession of the fallen's grudges forever. 
Surely there is no greater disgrace.
What do you do that for?

Data remains in their bones. By collecting them, I—we, 
really—inherit their grudges.
That sounds like quite a chore.

I do not need your pity, human. If you must, pity the grudges 
left behind in these bones.
I wish to be free... Free from all forms of control.
You'll be free one day.

So I must not give up hope, even though I do not know when 
that day will arrive...?
Everything comes with restrictions.
Very true. All I can do is bear this in mind...
You're free now.

Is that how you perceive it? Perhaps it is a matter of how I 
view things...
I'm here to help.

I am afraid you are only trying to console me, but your support 
is appreciated.
Do you believe in fate, or perhaps destiny?
I don't.
Then resist until the very end. I shall do all I can to assist you.
I want to.

If you harbor doubts, let things come as they will.
I shall watch over you until the end.
I do.
Believing is easy. But it also brings pain. Be prepared for that.
I don't want to.

And what will you do about this? If you intend to resist, 
I would like to help.
I wish I could swim for longer periods of time in the deep ocean...
Give it a shot!
I guess I'll never learn how if I don't try, right? Okay, I'll go for it, then!
Let's come up with a strategy.

Yeah, let's look up what makes it possible. I'm ready to do it 
by the book!
Time for some special training.

Special training? Like, something I do on my own? I sure wish 
you'd join me.
I'll watch you while you try.

I'm a little scared to try alone, so I'll be glad to have you there. 
Okay, let's do it!
What can I do to get better at singing?
Keep practicing, just like you've been doing!

I figured I couldn't improve overnight. Thanks a bunch! I'll keep 
up the hard work!
Why not go to a concert?
That's a good idea! Hearing others sing is important, too!
I'll join you if you wanna practice.
Oh, boy! That's super nice of you! Let's sing a duet, just you and me!
Just sing your heart out!
I see what you mean! Singing's more than just skill. It's heart!
I wonder... What's the most charming thing about me?
Your powerful attacks!

Yeah! I'm so cute, you'd never imagine I could throw down. 
You really get me, huh!
Your tactics that throw your foes off!
A-yup. Battle starts from your noggin! And I'm all noggin!
That shell that protects my little friend!
Yeah? I thought as much! This shell of mine is pretty fine.
The fact that you're a real cutie patootie!
Hehehe... You're embarrassing me, here. Thanks, though.
Fishy, fishy, fish-fish! *sigh* I wanna eat some fish...
Then go catch some, already.
You betcha, I will! And after I catch a bunch, I'll give you some, too!
Why not set a trap?

Wouldn't it be faster if I just caught 'em? But maybe I should
give the easy way a try.
Okay, let's go fishing!
That's what I wanted to hear! We're gonna catch a ton of fishies!
Want me to go find some?

Thanks. That really makes me happy! Let's find some together
and then eat 'em!
Hey, let's play that human game, rock-paper-scissors! One, two...
No mercy... Rock!
Dang it! I lost... But I won in spirit!
How about this...? The unbeatable hand!

W-Wow! You did rock, paper and scissors all at once! I've still
got lots to learn...
I'll go for a draw... Scissors!
Hey, you did scissors, just like me! That means we're friends!
Guess I'll let you win... Paper!
I won! Yay! But... I know what you did... Thanks, anyway.

I need a makeover... What should I change to give me that 
wow factor?
Swap out your helmet for a new one!

I see. I ought to be brave enough to change the stuff that stands 
out the most!
Why not start by reading a fashion magazine?

A fashion mag...? Huh. Like a book that shows you the latest 
duds? Sounds interesting!
I'll make you some new clothes.

You'd do all that? For little ol' me? You have no idea how happy 
that makes me!
You're fabulous the way you are.

Aw, shucks... Thanks. I mean it. Don't mind the blushing 
and everything...
My tail... Me, proud. Must get stronger!
You can still get stronger!
Of course! But me, happy you say that...
Why not develop a new move?
A new move... Yes, cool. You, help me think...?
I'll help you with training.
Train together... That sound fun. Me, happy...
The red on the tip of your tail is cool.
Yes! Red part, cool! You... understand good!
Arrr! 'ave ye spied any fancy booty as o' late?
I wouldn't mind a treasure hunt.

Aye, a search fraught with peril. May we find lands the likes 
o' which ne'er been seen.
Why not read an old tome?

Yo ho! Perhaps we may find knowledge within o' plunder what 
been squirreled away.
Let's go look for some together!

Well, ain't ye a sight for sore eyes! One's luck only grows 
among mates—as do the mirth!
You're the real treasure.

Blow me down! I 'adn't thought o' that. Ye done pleased this 
ole sea dog beyond measure.
*sigh* Gotta get me some new tunes to get this heart thumpin'...
Maybe you should make your own.
I never thought of that! My own tracks... Now, that'd be hype!
Why not hit up the clubs?

Now you're talkin'! Nothin' beats bein' there right in the middle 
of the music!
Want me to sing something?
You'd sing just for me? That'd be hella cool!
You really love music, huh?

A life without music ain't worth livin'! Gotta keep the tunes
bumpin' every day!
Ho, boy... My tummy doesn't feel right...
Why not gulp down some water?

Oh, I see! If I ate something funny, I could flush it out with a nice, 
big swallow, huh?
Should we check for a stomach bug?

Better to check than to try and deal with it blindly, for sure.
Good call!
Should I take a look inside your stomach?

What? You'd be willing to go in there? For me? How thoughtful
of you... Thank you.
Aw, that's too bad... But I'm here for you!

Those words ease the pain better than any medicine could.
Thank you for your kindness.
My blade... amazing... Kehehe.
And powerful, to boot!
You... get it. Blade, strong! Blade, COOL!
It'd be even better if you took care of it.
Took... care? Me, never think about that... Me, study...
Want me to polish it for you?
Yes! Me, grateful. You, good person.
You're pretty amazing yourself!
Me, too? Not just blade...? You, say nice things.
Make me sound cool when you talk to me.
All hail the hero WaruSeadramon!
You keeping talking to me like that, and I bet I can really cut loose!
Good day to you, Brave WaruSeadramon!

Makes me sound like one of those wandering samurai types. 
Yeah, it's got a ring to it.
What it is, my WaruSeadramon.
Sounds very... friendly. Yup, I like it.
Hey, Li'l WaruSeadramon!

"Li'l" is the total opposite of cool! It's cute, even! Still... 
Not so bad, I guess.
Darkness... is... comforting...
Let's go for a stroll in the sunlight.
I do not like it... yet it may be interesting to attempt.
Where does darkness come from, I wonder...

A fair question to ask. As to the answer... Seek that for
yourself.
Let's go for a nighttime stroll, then.

You choose darkness as I have? Hmm. Perhaps it would not
hurt to join you this once.
You're easy to find even in the dark.

Finding me in the gloom is no easy task... except, perhaps,
for you...
I want to live the slow life on a river with clean waters.
Why don't we go look for that river of yours?
That sounds like a great time! I might actually take you up on that.
Let's study how to clean up the rivers, then.

Oh! We can make rivers clean again with our own hands? 
I really like that idea.
We can clean up the rivers together.

It might take some time, but a little river cleanup could be fun 
if we take it slow.
I'd protect a river where you could live.
I get the feeling you'd really do it, too! You've got my trust.
I want to take over the vast oceans, rampaging wherever I please.
You could do it right now, if you wanted.

Yes. If I felt like it, I'd rule over all the seas. Shall I show you 
how I'd do it?
There are all kinds of seas around the world.

True. And different seas require different methods of attack. 
I should do some research.
I wanna go with you!

You want to see my glorious romp through the seas? Hmm. 
I'll take you along someday...
I bet you look beautiful when you swim.

You understand well. Yes, my true beauty is on full display 
when I'm in the ocean waves.
Allow me to hear your ambitions.
Traveling anywhere and everywhere!

Trek across this wide world, would you? That is a fine ambition, 
nay, a fine dream.
Knowing everything about the world.

You are greedier for knowledge than I ever imagined. Such 
hunger pleases me.
Helping you out with your ambition.

My ambition... That is greater strength. Perhaps with you, 
I could pursue this goal.
Being with you forever and ever.

Hmph. If that is your wish, very well. Not that I condemn such
an aim.
How can everyone live in peace, I wonder...
By having the courage to talk to each other.

Courage... I'm sure I'm lacking that. I feel like I can get some 
by sticking around you, though!
Understanding each other is key.

You're right. It's hard to be together, much less talk, if you lack 
empathy and insight.
Let's think of a way together.

Having you to depend on really puts me at ease. Let's keep on 
keeping on, together!
With love, peace is sure to follow.

Yeah. No matter what, I'll keep love and hope in my heart... 
especially for you!
*crash* *boom* Me, shiny, buff body! Me, super cool!
Looking swole, pal!

Hehehe... Me hoped you say that. Me wanna join human 
bodybuildin' competition!
And with smarts to match!
Me, brawn AND brains! Lookit me go! *crash* *bang*
So jealous!

You want me train you, too? We get real tough. JumboGamemon 
guarantee!
Your heart's practically shining, too!

Me, heart shine, but nobody else see... But you! You see. Me, 
take shine to YOU!
Googoo, gaga!
Are you angry?

If that's what ya think, then put your dukes up! Googoo! 
I'm comin' for ya! Gaga!
Are you hungry?

Keep a close eye on me!

New friends await!

Let's find out together.

The good ol' sol is nice and toasty! Sooo soothin'!
I'm ready to burn bright!

Hey there. Anything I can bee of help with?

Bee my friend!

I wanna try all sorts of challenges!

I wanna learn all kinds of things!

I wanna make all sorts of friends!

La laaa, la la laaaaa! ♪
That tune's so inspiring!

Oh, yes! I committed the bravery inside of me to song.

That's an odd little ditty.

Such a pleasant melody.

Is that a lullaby?

Your intelligence is a huge help.

You're a very good friend.

You're awesome!

Together, the two of us are untouchable!
Exactly! Nobody can get in the way of our friendship!

Courage... No understand the heart. But my chest... warm.

The knowledge to survive.

Friends who help each other.
Help each other... Taught me, you did. So important... friends are.
A loving heart.
Love... That hard. Teach me more. Me, still much to learn.
The idea someone could attack me at any time freaks me out...!

I'll play a tune to liven things up, glurp. Got any requests,

Something bold and stirring.

Something sophisticated.

Something fun.

Something sad.

Grr, I'm gonna mug at you good!

The cooler head will prevail.

Aww, what a cutie you are.

Whoa, that Momotaro guy's awesome! Now I'm all fired up!

So unfair that Urashima Taro got all old just for helping that

So even little crabs and their friends can beat a monkey

How about "The Tale of Princess Kaguya"?

So sad she went back to the moon and left those old folks

Why not turn on some lights?

It'd be a blast to hang out together.

Bzz... How do you like my wings?
They look cool and tough!

ALL WHO STAND IN OUR PATH SHALL BE ELIMINATED.

I HAVE THE STRONGEST PARTS, DIGICORE AND PROGRAMMING.

IF YOU ACCEPT ME, I WILL ALWAYS OFFER YOU MY

Puni, puniii!
