I wanna fight, too! Like, right now!
I wanna send you into battle soon.

First, I've gotta Digivolve into a stronger form, right? I'll do my 
best, so cheer me on!
You oughta watch some battles first.

I've been watching a whole bunch! I'm practically an expert 
at this point.
Easy does it, now.
All right. If you say so! Boy, you're a kind person, aren't you!
I don't wanna have you fight just yet.

Fine, then. I'll give up on the idea for now. You really know me 
pretty well, don't you!
Is my horn cool, or is my horn cool?!
It's a little scary.

Man, I must be pretty awesome if I can scare you. I'm gonna 
scare you some more!
That's a little... iffy.
Iffy? What do you mean by "iffy"? Come on! You can tell me!
It looks really strong.
What? It does?! That makes me pretty giddy! I'm not gonna lie.
It's cool as heck!

Appreciate it! I ought to Digivolve real soon, so I can get even
cooler.

If you wish to get stronger, I'd be more than happy to train you. 
What say you?
Train me, please!
That's the spirit! Learn all the techniques you can from me.
How can I get stronger?
Training is the only way, I'm afraid. Still, strength isn't everything.
I don't feel like training...

Yet training provides such unique insights! Perhaps even a way 
to read your opponent.
Strength isn't everything.
Well said. As long as those words aren't simply sour grapes.
I wanna do more for you.
Get even stronger, then.
You're right. First, I've gotta get stronger and Digivolve!
I don't wanna depend on others too much.
You being so brave like that just makes me wanna help you more.
Just you saying that is more than enough.
I'm glad you and I are friends!
You're doing just fine now.
Okay, then I'm gonna keep going with my training, so just you watch!
Hey, how goes it?
No problems to report.
Okay, then time for another full-throttle day!
Feeling great!

I shoulda known. I gotta stay more on top of my health game, 
like you!
Can't you see for yourself?
Yeah, of course I can!
Not too great.
Gotta make sure to take breaks every now and then, huh?
Soaring through the sky feels amazing!
I wanna fly with you.
If only you had wings like me, huh?
I know.
Huh? You've flown before? No way.
Running on the ground feels great, too.
Take me with you sometime!
I can't do heights.
Must be tough being human.
Which is faster, running or flying?
Both are fast.

I feel the same way. I want to get good at both so I don't have to 
worry about choosing.
I couldn't say.

Okay, then take notes next time I run and next time I fly and 
let's compare.
Running is faster.

I'd win a race against you... But just running together sounds like 
it'd be fun.
Flying is faster.

It seems that way since you can't fly, but slow is better when 
hanging out in the sky.
Not good enough! I gotta have more!
What do you need more of?
Power, speed and fighting spirit. Help me get into gear!
You're plenty strong.

Don't try to console me. Or maybe you're trying to show me 
another tactic...?
You're more than cool enough.
Well, that really takes the wind outta my sails. You win.
Time for some special training.
You're gonna join me? I knew I could count on you!
Which color do you prefer, red, blue, yellow or green?
Blue.

You like the shade of my legs? Some fear the hue thanks to
these sharp talons, but not you, no.
Red...

You like the tint of my crest? You must be intrigued by the 
lightning it shoots, too.
Yellow?

You like my wings' hue? If you can take it, I'll show you how 
they shine at sonic speed.
Green!

You like the tone of my body? I bet you hold the trees of the 
forest dear as well.
Check out these muscles!
Too hardcore for me.
Only an adult could understand the value of muscles like these.
I wish I had a body like yours.
Then you'd better hit the gym, pal.
Those sure are some awesome muscles!
Drink them in. I don't mind.
I wanna touch them.
...Just a little would be fine, I guess.
I'm gonna prank you good if you don't train properly!
I'll start now.
For real? I'm keeping my eye on you!
I'm taking it seriously. Promise.
Amazing! Glad to hear it. I look forward to seeing the results!
Nuh-uh. Don't wanna.
You're slacking off! Look out, because I'm gonna prank you!
If you're gonna prank me, then prank me.
Hehehe... Oh, this is gonna be good.
C'mon. Let's play!
Let's spar.
But that's training! You really are serious about stuff, huh?
Let's talk.
Okay, that works, too. I love listening to you!
Let's have a race.
I'm not very fast, but you'll never beat me!
Let's play tag.

Okay, then I'll be it. We could play hide and seek, but I know
I'd find you right away!
You wanna hear my song, or what?
Crank it up to eleven.

All right! I'm gonna shout at full blast! Get ready, or I'll knock ya 
off your feet!
Use your inside voice, please.

You want a nice li'l listening party, do ya? Okay, I'll burn my ditty 
into your brain.
How about a song and a dance?
If ya insist, then I'll put on a show! A live performance, just for you!
Let's make it a duet!

I won't lend ya the mic, but you can sing your heart out! This is
our harmony, baby!
Who would you say is a truly strong Digimon?
I couldn't say.

Nor could I, but if I keep on beating strong Digimon, I'm sure 
I'll figure it out someday.
I wouldn't say it was you.

That's understandable. This world is full of Digimon I've never 
laid eyes on, after all.
You, for sure.

Thank you. Having felled strong Digimon and copied their 
data, I am undoubtably strong.
It could be practically any one of them.

I see. Well, no matter what strong Digimon I end up facing, 
I hope you will back me up.
Don't you like the cold?
I'm not crazy about it.

Then you ought to train in the polar frost. You'll get used to it
for sure.
I'm fine with it.
Just make sure you can still say that even in the arctic chill.
I don't mind, as long as I've got my friends.
I'm glad to hear that.
It'd be nice if you'd keep me warm!

If you mean keeping warm with some warmups together, then 
I'd do it gladly.
I have confidence in my thrusters.
Show me, then.
This isn't exactly the best place to ignite my rocket engines...
Rocket engines are risky business.
Never you fear. I've got full control over them. You'll see.
Can't wait to see what you can do with them.

I won't let you down. These rocket engines are like an extension 
of my own body.
Careful with them, now.

I appreciate your concern. Looking forward to the chance to 
show them off!
No human is ever gonna tame me!
Oh, I'm gonna. Just you wait.
Tough talk. I look forward to seeing you try!
You're already tamed.
N-No, I'm not! Explain to me exactly how it is I'm tamed?
I'd never think of trying to.
Ha! I see you get it. You're in for lots of friendly pranks!
I want you to tame me.

Wh-What the...? I didn't expect that. A tame human might not
be all that bad, though...
How awesome is my million-volt Electric Shock?
High-voltage power lines carry 6,600 volts.

So Electric Shock is stronger, even though power lines are
way bigger then me? Wow!
Batteries have 1.5 volts.

Hey, so if I wanted to power my move with batteries, how
many would I need, huh? Huh?
Lightning is one hundred million volts.

Whoa! Didn't know lightning was that amazing. I got a ways 
to go... Cheer me on, okay?
An electrical outlet has one hundred volts.

So Electric Shock can't help around your house, huh? Don't
kick me out, though, okay?
I wanna go swimming.
I can't swim.
Then I'll teach you. Might be tough since you don't have fins, though.
Well, I don't.

I figured... But hopping around on land makes me tired, so
teach me how to move easier.
Let's go!

Uh, really? You do know nobody can beat me in the water, right? 
I'm not kidding!
Be patient.

I am, because I wanna hang out with you. It's just... 
everything's way easier in the water!
Have my claws gotten a little too long?
Yeah, they're too long.

I haven't whipped out Slash Claw much these days. Better put
these bad boys to good use!
I'd say they're too short.
What? You sure? Guess it's hard to tell on my own. I'm glad I asked!
Nah, they're just right.

Must be my imagination, then. Okay! Now I feel like slashing 
something up!
I didn't even notice.

Guess it doesn't matter in a scrap, huh? Still, I wish you paid 
closer attention...
Would you like me to give you a ride somewhere?
Take me somewhere I've never been before.

You feel that much at ease with me, do you...? I'll 
consider it, then.
I wanna go somewhere far away.

You and I have different ideas of what "far" is, so we should 
probably define that first.
I don't wanna go anywhere.

Perhaps I was mistaken. But you should know that 
flying feels wonderful.
I don't want a ride.

Well, if the day ever comes that you need my aid, all you need 
to do is ask.
Poyo, poyooo!
Pull yourself together!
Me, no lose!
You're doing really well.
Me, good 'mon!
Poyomon, was it?
Me, friend!
I love you, Poyomon!
Me, love you, too!
I wanna Digivolve fast into something real tough!
You're already strong, you know.
That's right! I chomp down on my foes real good!
You've got my support!
Teach me, teach me, pretty please!
You're nice and cute the way you are.

Really? Then maybe I won't Digivolve after all... Aw, but 
I really want to!
You'd better get a cool look, too!

If my Digivolution makes me stronger, that's cool enough for me. 
Heck, I'm cool already!

You have to apologize when you do something wrong, and 
apologize well... right?
That's right.

...I knew it. I'd better work up the courage to apologize. 
Sorry for the weird question.
Did you do something wrong?

No! ...Well, okay, I guess I do have some regrets. Thanks for 
making me realize that.
Did someone do something to you?
No biggie. It's already over and done with. Sorry for worrying you.
I'll apologize on their behalf.

You sure are nice, aren't you? In that case, I'll go ahead and 
forgive you.
Riding on a human's shoulders sure is relaxing!
I bet you're real heavy.

That's just not true. Humans seem pleased to have me ride on 
them. You should try it.
Don't go clambering on me.

I pick and choose my rides, thank you. Whether I'll ride you is 
still up in the air.
Hop on up, then. I'll give you a ride.

I appreciate the thought. Still, I need to get to know you better, 
or I can't relax.
Why not sit on their lap?

That's hardly the same, now, is it? I prefer the sensation of 
moving around with humans.
Say, what's a "puppy"?
A mischievous little critter.

Aw, what a shame! People say I look like one. If I ever spot one, 
I'm going to scold it!
A lifeform that looks like you.
Humans say that a lot, yeah. I'm real curious to know what they're like!
An animal beloved by many.

People say I look like one. I guess that's why humans are 
always so nice to me!
A creature that's cute as a button!

Cute?! I'm told I look like one a lot, you know. What a nice 
thing to say!
We ought to take things more easy-breezy.
I'd say we need to get more serious.

You're something else, aren't you? Still, don't go wearing yourself
out, now.
I'm already easy-breezy, baby!

Not from where I'm standing, but if you say so. I'll try to follow 
your example.
A little earnestness never hurt anyone.

Ease and earnestness are two sides of the same coin, y'know? 
I'm the perfect example.
Aren't you a little too easy-going?

Too much is just right for yours truly. You really know how to 
compliment a 'mon!
I'm... I'm not a crybaby, you know!
You're the dictionary definition of one.

I told you I'm not, but you... You...! *sniff* I won't cry, darn it! 
You hear me?!
Only crybabies say they're not crybabies.

I see. So that's how it is... I'll strike the word from my vocabulary, 
then, starting now!
In that case, don't cry.

Okay. I won't cry... I'm not crying right now, am I? That means 
I'm cured! Right?
Who said you were a crybaby?

Thanks for believing me! I bet no one'd call me that if you'd 
been around from the get-go.
I will not allow even the smallest of misdeeds to go unpunished.
Sorry for stealing your snacks.

I applaud you for having the courage to confess. However, 
never do it again.
Can't you give me a pass?

If you can exercise guile, you should never have dabbled in 
wickedness to begin with.
Sorry about all the farts.
...Please do not bother me with such banal antics.
My conscience is clean.
And this is why you of all humans have my trust. Most admirable.

Hey, pal! Where are you looking?! Over here! The tail is the 
one that's Reppamon!
Not the head part?

Wrong! I'm the one that cuts and cleaves. The head is just 
spineless window dressing!
The tail? Isn't that part just the blade?

That "just the blade" part you so glibly refer to is me, Reppamon! 
Get it straight!
Whatever. It's all the same to me.

Look. I'm just a tail, with a body and head hanging off me 
like a tail. Get it?
Aren't both of you Reppamon, a 2-in-1 deal?

Hey, if it were up to me, I'd just cut the other part off. 
But, sure. Have it your way.
I want you to make full use of the power of my Holy Ring.
I'd rather not use it if I don't have to.

You probably wouldn't have to if things stay peaceful—but that's 
an even taller order.
I wouldn't even know how to use it.
Don't worry. I'll teach you the ins and outs of the whole thing.
Thanks. I bet it'll be very useful.
I'm glad! It's important to have each other's backs.
Just make sure you don't lose it!

Thanks. But if things ever get dicey, I know you'll be there 
to protect me.
Let's travel around the world together!
I wouldn't be able to keep up.

Don't be a scaredy-cat! Besides, I can help you if you fall
behind.
Can humans fly, too?

Not unassisted, no. But with the right knowledge, anything
is possible.
I'd love to be able to fly.

Impossible without wings. Luckily, you have me to act as
your wings.
Let's go right away!

It isn't that simple. We can't let our excitement get the
better of us, here.
One must right the world's wrongs, condoning no evil.
I'll help you do that.

I want you to be the nucleus of our efforts. Thus it is I who 
should be helping you.
I feel the same way.

If we each act thoughtfully and do good, the world will move 
in the right direction.
I wanna be someone like that.
Each like-minded ally I can muster makes the world a better place.
I do that even when I'm by myself.
I am here for you. I would never leave that burden to you alone.

I walk the path of righteousness. Will you move forward
together with me on this path?
I'm not sure I'm up to it.

In that case, I insist we walk it together. You can start by
overcoming your own fears.
Yes, I'd like to.

If your determination is set, the path ahead shall open. Then
shall the learning begin!
I will. I have to!

That is what it means to be with me. I am pleased to see you 
understand as much.
I'd like you to follow me, actually.

I had hoped you would take the lead one day. I am pleased that 
today is that day.
I pledge my fealty to you, my liege.
So if I told you to die for me, you'd do it?

My loyalty to you stems from faith that you would never bid me 
do something so egregious.
You'll obey my command without question?

Your orders are absolute. Please guide me, so that I may never 
stray from the path.
You and I should be on equal footing.
I must be devoted to my liege. I have no desire to rise to your station.
I hope you come to like me.

But of course! And I hope my obedience is proof enough of 
that pledge.
I would never condone pointless killing!
What exactly would you do about it?
I would enact punishment! And do not think to interfere!
But you would if there were a point to it?

Killing never has a point! All life in the Digital World must be 
met with compassion!
Would you ever show mercy?
The offender must repent, and never take a life needlessly again.
Agreed.
Killing is born of conflict. We must aspire to a world free of strife.
Leave the vanguard to me.
I can't do that.

I prefer to take the forefront myself, but for you, I can make 
an exception.
I'll think about it.
I look forward to seeing what strategy you devise.
It's all yours.

When the Golden Meteor charges forth, you will witness swordplay
of unparalleled speed.
Just don't lose it when you fight.

Is that sarcasm? My swordplay is on par with a Holy Knight, but
I will accept your advice.
You must remember to lock up everything.
I'll leave that to you.

I must safeguard the Zenith Gate. It is your responsibility to lock 
your own doors.
I worry about forgetting to lock up.

Then you must always double-check. It is even better to confirm
it out loud.
I always do.
That is wonderful. If it ever comes to it, we can help each other.
I wanna help.

I can handle the security of the Zenith Gate alone. But I appreciate 
the thought.

I am a Super Angel, one of three Celestial Digimon guarding 
the Digital World's Kernel.
Can I help you in any way?

I would be happy if you spread word of my love and mercy 
throughout the Digital World.
What is your duty?

My duty is to spread love and compassion throughout the 
Digital World. It is who I am.
What's a Super Angel?

One of the roles among angels, and a Digimon type, much like 
"Insectoid" or "Reptile."
Is it okay for you to be here?

My presence here means there is something for me to observe, 
and to accomplish.
I am a Seraph Digimon, one who reigns over all Angel Digimon.
Can I help you in any way?
Do not allow evil to exist in this world.
Does that make you remarkable?

I am of the highest Angel Digimon echelon, yet that is simply 
the role bestowed upon me.
What's a Seraph?

The greatest of all angels, they say. That does not change 
the fact that we are friends.
Is it okay for you to be here?

I leave this place when the final battle is nigh. Until then, 
I shall stay with you.

Don't stand behind me. I won't be held responsible if you 
get a kick to the head.
Kick me if you need to.

Talk about asking for it... You'll change your tune once you 
see my Rodeo Gallop.
Would it really hurt that much?

"Hurt" wouldn't begin to describe it. Imagine it as a strike 
both brutal and true.
Can I ride you?

I would prefer you didn't without reason, but for the right cause 
I would acquiesce.
Don't you do it, now.

It's a reflex, I assure you. Though perhaps your special presence 
would negate it?
Allow me to enchant you with the light of my smile.
You're not upset?

Such thoughts are proof of your impurity. One day, I shall 
purify you with my charm.
Wait. You're smiling?
Wait. You cannot tell? One day, I shall purify you with my charm.
Oh, I'm enchanted.
But of course. I have faith that you and I shall get along swimmingly.
I won't let you.

Other humans said the same, but they, too, were mesmerized. 
As you shall be, I am sure.
Do you believe in miracles?
I sure do!

If there is any difficulty you wish to overcome, trust in me to 
see you through.
I mean, I'd like to...

I sense hesitation within you. Stick with me, and one day 
you shall believe.
Not a chance.

The power of miracles is real. You must never give up, no matter 
how hard the situation.
I believe in you, Magnamon.

That is good to hear. To believe in me is to believe in the power 
of miracles.
Nobody's got more guts than me!
What about stuff other than guts?

The sun is on my side, so my flames are unbeatable! Let's 
get out there and fight!
That's impressive.

I know. It's always the guys with the least guts who say others 
don't have any.
Let's fight, then.
Huh? But I wanted to be friends... We're in this together, right?
You're a strong one.
Thanks. So you respect me, huh? I respect you back.
Hmm? Did you say something just now?
I was cheering you on!

I thought so! Figured you might be talking to someone else... 
Thanks! Let's do our best!
Just talking to myself.

Yeah? Well, why not talk to me instead? I'm sure you've got 
tons to teach me.
I didn't say anything.

I thought I heard your voice. My mistake. My hearing works 
against me sometimes...
I was just saying hello!

I thought so. Appreciate it! I was confident I could pick out 
your voice. I'm glad I did!

I have been chronicling all wisdom since the distant past. 
Nothing is beyond my knowledge.
So do you know what I'm thinking right now?

That has nothing to do with wisdom. If you seek to test me, 
know that it is pointless.
I wanna learn.

I shall teach you what I can. To build the future, you must 
know the past.
That's kind of scary.

The wisdom I possess can discern the future. I shall not apply 
that same scrutiny to you.
Wish I could be like that.

Instead of wishing, I would have you learn from my wisdom 
and make it your own.
Gigigi! Gigigigi!
You're kinda hot, aren't you?

Gigigi... That's my hot DigiCore. Sorry for the stuffiness. Just
think of it as training!
Are you Hagurumon?
Gigigi! I'm Solarmon, and don't you forget it!
Your shine... It's almost angelic.

Gigi? You saying I'm divine or something? Come on. You're
gonna make me blush...
You're looking red in the face today.

Gigi? Yeah, my face is always like this. Hope you're not mistaking 
me for someone else.
Is there anything I can do for you?
Share some of your intensity with me.
Intensity comes from within, so that's a task only you can complete.
I wanna learn how to be calm like you.

Do I look calm to you? I'm merely thinking of what I can do
before the battle begins.
Let me ride on you.

I wouldn't mind, but your posterior would catch fire. It may
be better to grab my legs.
I wanna be with you forever.

Any strong desire is bound to come true. I shall remain with
you until the end of time.
Flames obey my bidding.
You shouldn't burn things.

My flames are sacred, and only ever unleashed to cleanse 
evil from the Digital World.
Can you incinerate garbage?

I can reduce anything to ash, but I must remain mindful 
of the environment.
Can you put out fires, too?

That is a tall order... However, you have my word I shall deal
with any blazes I create.
Can you heat up water?

There is nothing I cannot heat up. If it is hot water you desire, 
then it shall be done.
The flames of the fire dragon reduce all foes to ash!
Even the really, really big foes?

The mightier the opponent, the brighter my fighting spirit 
burns—and my flames to match!
Even a whole slew of foes?

I'll leave tactics to you. I don't care how bad things get in battle! 
I never back down!
You sure there's nothing left of them after?

Shoot a laser that rivals the sun, and you won't find anything 
in its wake! Trust me.
Well, what if they get away?

That'll never happen. I'll whip up a blazing tornado with my flame 
wings to protect you!
I want to Digivolve and mechanize my entire body...
Sounds like you'd get really strong.

I think I'm pretty strong already, but I'd love to see just 
how powerful I could get.
You're great the way you are.

I like my body the way it is, but I've got to pursue any 
possibilities I can.
I bet you'd look cool as all get-out.

Looks have nothing to do with it. I want to see just how 
strong I can get.
I like you, flesh and blood.

So the look I used to have is superior? Not sure if that makes 
me happy or sad...
I SHALL PROTECT THIS LAND.
I'll leave it to you, then.
YES. REST ASSURED. I CAN ATTACK IN ALL DIRECTIONS.
Nah. Don't worry about it.

THAT WILL NOT DO. AS A GUARDIAN DEITY, I HAVE A DUTY 
TO PERFORM.
Looking forward to your protection.
IT IS MERELY THE DUTY OF A GUARDIAN DEITY.
Thank you very much.
I AM PLEASED TO RECEIVE YOUR THANKS.
Can anything win against the energy of the sun?
Nope, not happening.
Exactly. None can compete with the blazing-hot energy of that star.
Your power.

True. Without my knowledge, it would be hard to convert the 
sun's power into my strength.
My power.

Putting aside whether you could beat the sun, I acknowledge
your abilities, my friend.
The power of friendship.

True. The power of friends is nothing to scorn. They let me show 
the sun's true worth.
I must purge you of all evil!
Don't hurt me!

With evil purged, pain and anguish will be gone forever. What
of a brief moment of pain?
Hold on!

I cannot allow evil to thrive! Still, let us decide the best time to 
purge you together...
Don't purge me!

Do you have a guilty conscience? If so, all the more reason to
do something about it!
Go ahead. Do it now!

When the time comes, I shall purge you of evil with all haste. 
Leave that timing to me.

Preaching the virtues of goodness to me would just be
wasted effort.
Even so, I'm still gonna advocate for it.

It would amount to nothing, but you do say funny things. 
I applaud your pluck, at least.
There must be good in you somewhere.

I don't know what you're misunderstanding. Never
underestimate the power of darkness.
I agree wholeheartedly.
So, you get it, do you? Sensible human.
I feel sorry for you.

Your attempt to grab my attention is pointless. You're the
pitiable one.
Which is superior, a wild nature or intelligence?
A wild nature.

Yes, perhaps my wildness is the source of my unflinching 
fighting spirit.
Intelligence.

Yes, my intellect may be where my firm resolve to fight for my
friends comes from.
They're impossible to compare.

Yes. A true warrior must balance a wild spirit with reason,
just as I do.
No use worrying about it.

True. No time for such thoughts when fighting for one's
friends on the battlefield.
Maybe it's about time to redo my bandages...
I'll help you.

To render me defenseless, you mean? Sorry for not trusting 
you, but I'll pass.
I'd love to see how that works.

To observe me, you mean? No, thank you. I'll redo my wraps 
when you aren't looking.
You don't need to fix them.

I can't fight well with loose bandages, but if you say so, I'll 
deal with it.
They're a little smelly, honestly.

How rude! Although I guess I wouldn't have noticed unless 
you said something...
Say, is it hot, or is it just me?
Not at all.

So it's just my heat sensitivity? All right, then. I'll try riding it out 
a little longer.
I'd say it's cold, if anything.

Huh. No one I met at the South Pole liked the cold, either. 
Are all humans that way?
It's just right.

I knew it. I just can't get comfy without ice around. Let's go 
someplace a little cooler!
It's sweltering.

You look pretty comfortable to me. Let's go take a dip in 
icy water, you and me!
Say, am I really that chubby?
You're pretty plump, yeah.

I'm not exactly fast, sure, but plump? It's just a little bulk for my 
Harpoon Torpedo.
Who said you were fat?

I knew it! If anything, I'm slimming down. I've got a lot of stress, 
you know.
You're still the same as ever.

Right? Thanks! That's a relief. It's such a weight off my mind.
I'm even feeling peckish.
Couldn't really say, myself.

You're my friend, so keep a close eye on me, okay? Warn me if
I start ballooning up.
I want to invite everyone out to my snow hut!
I'd love to live with you.

You're more than welcome! Just don't catch a cold. It's a bit chilly 
for humans out there.
I'll go for sure!

I hope you get to see what I love about living in a world 
of ice and snow.
I think I'll pass.

Can't stand the cold, huh? I'd better warm up the inside 
of my hut, then.
Don't you get cold there?

I'm fine, of course! Besides, my heart's filled with warmth 
when I'm with you.

I hear they call me a "Rare Animal Digimon." What's so rare
about me?
People don't run into you all that often.

You can meet me anytime in the hinterland! Though it might be 
too harsh for you humans.
No one knows where you live.

Deep in the snowy mountains. But it's sacred ground, so don't 
go trampling around.
Nothing I can think of.
Makes sense. After all, I met all of you, and now we're friends!
You're a cool, curious find!

You're making me blush under all this fur. Don't worry, though. 
I won't run and hide.
I just can't abide this heat.
I don't think it's hot.

Fie! Get too used to this heat, and you'll be frozen solid when
the weather turns cold!
I'd say it's cold, if anything.

Ya think so? Ya shouldn't come to the permafrost, then.
Maybe that's for the best.
Why not take off some of those clothes?

Would if I could... But since we're friends now, I'll just try and
get used to this heat.
Your fur sure looks nice and toasty.

More like nice and cold. It's like ice crystals! Want me to cool
ya off?
What word would ya say captures the essence of yours truly?
Sneaky...

E-Excuse me?! Still, you ain't wrong. If anything, that's the 
best compliment ever!
Ultimate.
I'm a Mega, ya know. Get yer facts straight!
Invincible?
Man, you get it! Maybe I oughta jot that across my chest instead?
Strongest!

You just looking at my chest, or what? Still, you ain't wrong. 
Take a nice, long gander!
I want to take a quick run around here.
Can you give me a ride?

I'm glad such breakneck speeds don't make you queasy, 
but maybe I'd better not.
Let's run together!

I like your pluck! Still, I'm real fast, you know. I run at the speed 
of lightning itself.
I think I'll pass, myself.

But darting across the land feels real good. I wish I could give 
you a ride.
Let's just take it easy.
If you insist. Let's chill for today. We can save the run for another day.
I'll take a short jaunt through the skies.
Bon voyage!

I want to survey the ground safety from the air. I'll be back before 
you know it.
I'll watch you from here.

I'd be impressed if human eyes could follow me. I imagine you'll 
lose track real quick.
Take me with you.

Flying with you would be pretty fun, but this is no time for games. 
Maybe next time.
By yourself? That's not fair.

I wish I could take you with me, but the skies contain their fair 
share of dangers.
Hey, boss, what can a 'mon do for ya?
Rub my shoulders.

...Yeah, okay, just don't blame me if I rub the blood right outta 
them, though.
What can you even do?

Anything you want. Honest! And underhanded shenanigans—those 
are my bread and butter!
Go buy me some juice.

C'mon, boss. That's a little... How about a command worthy 
of my crafty cunning?
You're doing more than enough already.

Don't be like that. Use me and abuse me all ya want. I'm ready 
and waiting, 24/7!
The power of humans is a trifling thing.
The power of humans is limitless.
Intriguing. I should like to see a display of this power.
The power of Devimon is a trifling thing.

You have a sharp tongue. However, one day you will need my
strength and intellect.
Human potential is limitless.

A valid point. Humans do at times act in a manner that defies
logic. Perhaps you, too...
But we have the power of love.

Though I will never be deceived by it, love is indeed not a force
to be taken lightly...
Have you any interest in the dark arts?
Not even a little.

Hehehe. Drop the act. Any human who would befriend me 
would not say such a thing.
Teach me, teach me!

You certainly wear your heart on your sleeve. Pray you do 
enough to earn my favor.
I'll admit I'm curious.

Yes. You befriended me, so you must have some interest. Still, 
I choose who it is I teach.
They're evil, and have to be stopped.

You would try to reform one as wicked as me? Ludicrous! But I look 
forward to the attempt.
I'll say this much. Fights aren't won with empty sentiment!
I don't use underhanded tricks.

Would you say that even if you were cornered? I look forward 
to finding out.
What's wrong with a little lip service?
Don't you get it? Lip service won't work on the wicked.
You don't have to worry.

Hohoho. All right, then. I look forward to the day you come 
to beg for my help.
I'll leave the sneaky tactics to you.

Well said! I am craven, cruel and callous. I look forward to 
the day we fight together.
Knife or machine gun? Which should I use today...?
Use both.

Yeah, good call. I'd like to get in a dark-energy kick while 
I'm at it, too.
The machine gun.

Oro Salmón's bullets have a will of their own. I should charge 
people to watch me shoot.
The knife.

I guess a knife would do for playing around with you. Not that 
I'd ever stab ya.
Don't use either.

Don't see any targets around, so maybe I'll skip the weapons
for today and just have fun.
DO YOU FEAR DEATH?
I really can't say.
TO FEAR DEATH IS TO BE UNABLE TO FIGHT...
Teach me about it.
I, TOO, WANT TO KNOW...
It's terrifying.

I DO NOT WANT TO FIGHT YOU, BUT ALL WHO FACE ME FACE 
THE THREAT OF DEATH.
I'm not afraid.

I AM GLAD I DO NOT HAVE TO SEE YOU SHAKEN BY THE THREAT 
OF DEATH.
Tremble before evil.
Evil will be defeated.

Pray that your lack of fear does not rush you into death's
embrace, human.
I fear nothing.

Then right this erroneous thinking at once. A lack of due fear
will lead to your demise.
I'm full of fear.

Fear me, an Evil King Digimon with many evil and Dark Angel
Digimon under my command.
I despise evil.

The deepest hate springs from the strongest love, it would
seem.
How would you feel about a game of cards?
No cheating, now.

I hardly need a lecture from you. Someone as strong as me 
doesn't need tricks.
No, thank you.

Smart move. Avoiding ill-advised competition is the key to a
long life.
That sounds fun.

Oh? But I'm the one who'll have the fun, you know. You will 
provide the entertainment.
Sounds like a yawn.

Oh, do pardon me. I wouldn't play so boring a game that you'd 
have no chance of winning.

I was meant to be good... A Celestial Cherub Digimon guarding
the Digital World's Kernel.
Anything I can do to help?

If you are prepared to fall into the dark with me, then yes. But 
I cannot go back.
You mean you're not good now?

I am now fanatically evil. Ultimately, I was never anything 
more than a worthless beast.
What are Cherub Digimon?

High-ranking angels. Now that I have fallen into darkness, 
I am simply your friend.
Are you sure you wanna be here with me?

Even though I have fallen to the corruption of evil, it is my 
choice to be by your side.
I'm often told I resemble someone, but who could it be...?
BurningGreymon.

Yes, our talons and tails are similar. Judge for yourself
which of us is stronger, though.
Agunimon.

Our faces are similar, true, but I'd like you to look
closer and see how we differ.
AncientGreymon.

Saying I resemble a quadrupedal dragon is vexing, but at least 
you think I'm strong.
Flamemon.

Strangely, that does not bother me, though I don't feel I have 
such youthful features.
Don't worry. I don't bite.
I'll never forgive you if you do.
But I don't! Honest! Look. Let's just go bash some bad guys together!
Liar.
I'm not lying! I only bite enemies.
I'm not worried.
Good! Because we're friends. Thanks for believing me!
You can bite me if you want.

Hey, I never bite my friends. But I suppose I could, if you really 
wanted me to...
I wanna dig a hole somewhere.
Do whatever you want.

Okay, then I'm digging a tunnel! I'm gonna try to make it the 
biggest one yet!
No digging.

But I love digging holes... Let me know if there's somewhere
okay to dig!
Dig here! Woof!
Woof? I don't make that sound, you know.
Making a new Guilmon lair?
Hey, good idea! It can be our secret Guilmon hideout!
Aren't my tails cool?
Not really.
...Wh-What?! You aren't even impressed by how I can fan 'em out?
How many do you have?
I've got nine of 'em! Awesome, huh? I can't give ya any, though!
Very cool.
Feel free to copy me if ya want!
Your tails aren't all that's cool about you.
Th-Thanks. I didn't expect such a nice compliment...
Hey, are you happy we're friends now?
I'm not sure.

What's not to be sure about? I'm not scary. I'll be right here 
with ya forever.
No.
But you look super happy. C'mon. Let's get to know each other better!
A little.

...Huh. Do you mean you're a little happy? C'mon. No need to
be shy! You can tell me!
I am!
Hehe. Then we both like each other. Let's go on a date sometime!
Anybody who makes fun of me is in for a world of hurt!
That's the wrong attitude to have.

You trying to scold yours truly? Since we're pals, I'll
pretend I didn't hear that...
That goes for me, too.

I got ya. I just gotta show you respect, right? You better
not poke fun at me, then.
Hey, I hold you in high regard!

Hehe! So you're picking up what I'm putting down, huh? I
guess we'll get along just fine.
Let's all just get along with each other.

All right. Fine—just to make ya look good. Won't even
prank nobody or nothing.
Say, let's chill somewhere nice and damp.
Not happening.

Aw, man. And I was so nervous to ask! Here I thought you'd 
make my heart pound even more.
Maybe next time.
You promise? I'll take you to all the best soggy places!
Let's chill somewhere else.
Then I'll take you somewhere nice and slimy instead. Awesome choice!
Just for a little bit.
...Oh! Now I want to poop a little!
I want to come up with a new skill. What do you think it should be?
A brave, head-on, ramming attack!

So just charge in without looking? That'll take some courage... 
but I like it!
A weak point attack that hits where it hurts!

That means finding the enemy's weakness... Another reminder
of why it pays to be smart.
A partner attack where we strike together!

You mean, you attacking with me?! Our friendship would give
me even more power!
Never be reckless! An ironclad guard move!

You're suggesting some defense instead of only attacks? That's 
real nice of you...

Hey! I know about the mounds of trash humans are pilin' up.
What're ya gonna do about it?
Keep telling everyone to be less wasteful.
Speakin' up takes courage. Good on ya fer leadin' the way!
Sort my garbage and recycle properly.

Good. With the right mindset, trash ain't trash no more, right? 
Ya got my support.
Let's look for reusable stuff together.

Good thinkin'. What say we find some matchin' teacups as a
sign of our friendship?
There's no such thing as trash.

Hohoho! I like your way of thinkin'. All things deserve to be treated 
with love.

I dream of opening a restaurant someday that serves huge portions. 
Think it'd succeed?
Definitely. Go for it!

You think so?! Okay... Now all I need is the guts to see my plan 
through!
Study the location and competition first.
Ah, I get it. You need smarts to run a successful business, huh?
I'd work there, too!

That'd be a huge help! The two of us could be the friendliest 
foodsters around!
You can bet I'd eat there every day!

Hehe. Every day? Shucks... I'd put all the love I could into 
the food, then!

People get pretty freaked out the first time they meet me. 
What can I do...?
Be brave and talk to them!

Hmm... You're right. It all starts with talking. I'll try to work up 
the courage!
Try analyzing their reaction.

So first I have to figure out what's scaring them, huh?
That's a good point. Thanks!
I'll help you make more friends!

I'm glad you're my friend! Let's make a whole bunch more 
buddies together!
I know just how amazing you are.

What a lovely thing to say! You might be the only friend I need, 
in the end.
Don't treat me like a kid!
But you are a kid.

...I mean, sure, but I've got more passion in my left pinky than
a whole adult does!
Then act like an adult, already.

And what's not adult about me?! ...Oh. Knee-jerk reactions like 
that, huh?
Cheeky little brat!

How dare you! Just you wait. I'll get so strong, I'll make you eat 
those words!
Is that supposed to be cute?

Who said I wanna be cute?! One day, you'll be calling me tough
and cool!
My weapons are these cool blades! What are yours?
The courage to take on any opponent.
A weapon hidden inside where no one can see is pretty darn cool!
My Digimon knowledge.

I'm no good at that stuff, but I know it's important. You be the 
brains. I'm the brawn!
My trustworthy companions.
That includes me, right? Because you're definitely someone I trust!
You, my partner.

Hey, now! You trying to make me blush? I appreciate the thought, 
though!

See what happens when you cross the best parts of dragon 
and insect!
Those claws sure look sharp.

I can even launch them. Once I've sunk my spikes into a foe, 
they're not getting away.
You look like you have incredible power.

A dragon's might is strong within me, but don't forget an insect's 
agility backs it up.
What a hard shell you've got.

An insect's carapace offers flawless defense. And I won't forget 
to protect you, too.
What are those things attached to your waist?

They fire energy waves. As long as I draw breath, I'll always fight 
for my friends!

Show me what you're made of! If I stood before you as a foe, 
what would you do?!
Answer with my fist.

So you have the courage to strike me, do you? I like that
about you!
Talk things out and get to know you.

So you would choose words, not fists, eh? Not all battles are
won with force, that's true.
Fight until we reached an understanding.

Yes, the bond between us will grow strong. To know a friend, 
you must fight them!
I don't wanna fight you.

Heh. You don't wish me to be a foe even in parable. Soft... 
but I like that about you.

Anybody who strays from the path of righteousness gets no
mercy.
Bring it on.

Well, well. If you've got the guts to throw down with me, going 
astray won't be a worry.
Nothing to fear here.

Hey, I'll be here to slap some sense into ya, so why not be a 
little naughty?
It might be too late.

Don't be stupid. As long as there's light in these eyes of mine, 
it's never too late.
I'll be careful.

Gotta love that innocence. I'll always set ya straight, so do 
whatever ya want!

For the sake of greater strength, I must go out and train. What
training should I do?
Journey to unseen lands.

So tempering the heart is more important than the fist? Courage
is paramount in a fight!
Read lots of books.

I didn't even think of that. The right knowledge lets you dominate 
any foe, huh?
Let's spar together!

You'd join me in my training?! I see... Yes, we should grow
stronger together, my partner.
I don't want you to go train.

Haha. Worried I wouldn't come back? Well, never fear. If I go,
you're coming with.

A certain someone dares call me "Beelzemon Lady." As if I'd
ever partner with that fool!
Just be better than Beelzemon, then.

True. I hate to admit it, but I AM the lesser-renowned of us. 
I must fight to change that!
Use the nickname to your advantage.

I never thought of that... Using the name could have its benefits. 
You're quite clever.
Your partner is standing right here.
You know... You're right! Yes... It's you who is my partner!
Nicknames don't matter. You are who you are.
Hee hee. I had a feeling you'd say that!

I want to show off my new superstardom in a video!
What would you shoot if you were me?
A reverse bungee jump into the stratosphere!

That'd give everyone an eyeful of my pluck, huh? Got it. I'll 
arrange a jump right away!
Acing a super hard trivia contest?

Showing off my smarts, huh? Nice! Better swap the shades
for some specs.
A two-person food tour!

A performance with us at center stage, huh? That'd be a swell 
show of camaraderie!
A 24-hour stream of our life together!

What? Like, a live video? Hoho! A life with you sounds like a
fun time to me!
I'll show you speed invisible to the naked eye!
I bet you make crazy shockwaves.

My moves do, sure, but the ones fired from my hands and 
chest are way more amazing.
I'd love to see it!

Even so, you may only get a glimpse of an afterimage at the 
speed I move at.
If it's that fast, how can I even see it?

It's not like you can't see it at all. Even just my afterimage is 
something to behold.
How fast are we talking, here?

It's hard to explain, but even if you can't see me, I'm sure you'll 
sense my presence.

I'd love you to introduce me to some human food.
What would you recommend?
Spicy hellfire ramen!

The name alone tells me I'd need some pluck.
What lies beyond that flavor? I must know!
A DHA-rich fish platter! Plenty of Omega-3!

A dish that feeds both the stomach and the brain?
How fantastically efficient!
Let's have a hotpot party!

A meal more enjoyable when eaten together!
It would be an honor to share that with you!
I'll make you a good home-cooked meal.

Home cooking? For me? Hoho! I imagine that would be 
tastier than any restaurant's fare.

Humans are supposed to be weak, but I sense a strength of 
sorts. Where does it come from?
Such courage comes from deep within one's heart.

I see. So humans fight despite their frailty. Is that what you call 
"strength of heart"?
We make up for our weaknesses with wisdom.

Wisdom can compensate for such things? Hmm... Perhaps 
I should expand my own knowledge.
From joining forces with our friends.

Even small embers can create a fire, yes? Imagine how you and 
I could blaze together.
Our feelings for others make us stronger.

That is difficult to understand. Feelings make you stronger? 
Humans are fascinating.
Have any foes you want deleted?
"Deleting" sounds a bit harsh.
I erase enemies without a trace. That is my calling.
No need to delete them.
Vaccines annihilate viruses. That is the proper way of things.
I do.

Your foes are my foes. By the time you notice, they will have 
already been erased.
Nope.

Impossible. Your foes will be found and erased along with the 
space around them.
I'm way cooler than that blue jerk, right?
SO much cooler!
You and me think alike! I'll fight by your side forever and ever!
You're both awesome!
I wanted you to say me, but you're a pretty swell human, ain't you?
You're pretty much the same?

You think so? All right, then. I'll have to Digivolve into an 
even cooler form!
I like the blue one better...

Why I oughta— Wait. Are you poking fun at me? You should 
just say what you really think!

Hey, you can't fly, right? Well, you can hop on my back. 
Where do you want to fly to?
I wanna go super fast!

Ha! You're a brave kid! My gliding can get pretty intense, 
though! Wanna give it a go?
I wanna go see what's in the clouds.

Hey, I've never seen the clouds up close, either. Seeing how 
they're made might be fun!
Let's go see a rainbow together.

I heard that rainbows are like bridges that connect friends. 
Maybe we should have a look!
Anywhere is fine as long as we go together.

Hehe... I was thinking the same thing! I'm sure we'll have 
fun wherever we go!
I am "Rapidmon," not "Rabbitmon." Don't get it twisted!
It's all the same to me.

As long as I can move and fight quickly, I guess the name isn't 
such a huge deal...
What's the difference?

"Rapid" means swift. "Rabbit" doesn't! That's a pretty big 
difference, pal!
Are you sure it's not "Rabbit"?

Your ears clogged or what?! It's "Rapidmon"! We're friends now, 
so you'd better remember!
I know, I know.

Whew, that's a relief! Humans get it twisted sometimes, you see. 
Be careful, okay?
Which do you like, white or black?
Definitely white.

I slash my foes with my white wing. I'll show you just how 
lethal it is someday.
Must we be so black and white about things?

Very funny... Still, I suppose you're right. Not all things can be 
so clearly divided.
A little of column A, a little of column B.

I, too, am fond of both my white wing and black wing. I'd say 
we have similar tastes.
Black, for sure.

I can conceal myself with my black wing, though I have no need 
to hide from you.

What do you think of my red scarf? It suits me quite well, 
wouldn't you agree?
Kind of tangled on you, isn't it?

It's just entwined around my neck. I appear and disappear like 
the wind, after all.
A bit long, isn't it?

How is it supposed to flutter in the wind, otherwise? This is the 
length of justice.
Suits you to a tee!

Thank you kindly. Nothing says "Justimon" quite like a red scarf, 
I must say.
I don't think it's really you.

First I've ever heard such an opinion. Even so, I have faith it'll 
grow on you in time.

I've obtained the ultimate power... but it's not enough. 
Can you tell what's missing?
The courage to retreat.

...I can respect that. Retreat requires the utmost courage, 
yet is sometimes necessary.
Knowledge of the opponent you face.

So knowledge can trump even overwhelming power? Then 
that would make me invincible!
Friends you can trust.

Hmm... Friends push each other to greater heights? Good. 
Become my friend, then.
Love for those you wanna protect.

Having someone to protect makes you stronger? Then I'll 
protect you on the road ahead.

There must be some fun, even for one as short-lived as me. 
Any suggestions?
Adventure to unknown worlds.

Just the word "adventure" gets me excited. Adventuring right to 
the end might be nice.
Read tons of books.

Yes, I can learn about many times and places, all from here. 
Reading is like a journey.
Let's play a card game!

Heh. A game that can't be played alone, huh? If you play with
me, I'm willing to try.
Let's just keep on chatting together.
Hmm... If my time is limited, it might be fun to spend it all with you.

I know I'll never get it, but... what is it about humans that makes 
them so frantic?
Strong feelings make people stronger.

You don't say? Surpassing your original power through emotion alone! 
How odd humans are.
There's so much we wanna learn.

My, but you humans are greedy. You wish to know what lies beyond 
or is out of sight.
We wanna be with the friends we care about.
Are friends such a valuable thing? In that case, try and befriend me!
We have things we wanna protect.

Is protecting something so important? I don't understand... 
yet nor I do abhor the concept.

I'm gonna have a party with my Digimon friends! What should
we do for fun?
Sing a song in front of everyone!

Um... I think I'm too shy for that. But it would be cool. Maybe
I'll be brave and try!
Have a trivia contest.

Wow, that would be lotsa fun! I'm gonna read lotsa books and
make the questions!
Have everyone draw a big picture together.

You mean on the same piece of paper? Sounds like it'd be fun,
and would make for a good memory!
How about making some snacks?

Sounds tricky... but I'd like to show my love for everyone! Hey,
can you help me practice?

I wanna be an adorable mascot character! How can I get 
everyone to like me?
Try doing a daring stunt!

Everyone likes watching those, huh? Maybe I'll do a bungie
jump or play chicken!
Show off your intellectual side.

People do love smart quiz masters, huh! Okay, time to hit 
the books and become a brainiac!
I'll do PR for you.

Huh? You'd spread the word about me? Now, that's a real
friend! I'm counting on you!
People love you the way you are now.

I'm fine the way I am...? You know, maybe you're right. 
Yay, I'm super happy!

The mark on my chest looks like a "V," doesn't it? What do you 
think it stands for?
"Valor." It's a symbol of courage!

Whoa, how friggin' cool is that?! I'd better make sure to live up 
to this "V" in combat!
"Victory." It means you always win!
"Victory," huh? Hehe. I hope I never let you down!
"Virtue." You always do the right thing!

That's right! And that means I'll never abandon you. You can 
count on me!
"Vitality." You're full of energy and life!
Vitality? Yeah! I'll always put my vitality to work for you!
I still need more power.
You've gotten a lot stronger.
Maybe compared to before I Digivolved, but I gotta do better than this!
You're pretty cool, though.
All that talking me up isn't gonna work! I've grown out of that stuff!
You just have to train more.
Right. All I can do is train! I wanna keep Digivolving, so cheer me on!
I like you the way you are.

But I want you to like me even more, and that's why I'm gonna
train to get stronger!
Running is WAY faster than flying, I tell you!
Those are some sturdy legs you've got.

Yep, you know it. I can run the whole day away, no problem. 
No one can beat me!
That's not true.

You'll get it once you see me run. Heck, maybe I'll even give you 
a ride.
Running must feel great.

It sure does. Flying along the ground is the best! Join me. 
You'll see what I mean.
I bet flying feels even better.

Flying's cool and all, but I'll take a good run any day. Join me 
on the road sometime!
Please tell me! What do you fight to protect?!
My own pride.
That must be some pride you have! You have my respect!
Ruins, old tomes and other precious culture.

You'll pass on history to future generations. I, too, will fight 
to protect the ruins!
The friends I believe in.

Yes, friends are more valuable than gold and silver! I'm happy 
to count among yours!
You, my dear partner.

You think of me as your partner?! I'm touched! I'll fight to 
protect you, partner.
A warrior must always walk the path of righteousness.
You're allowed to make mistakes sometimes.

True. Happens to everyone. The most important thing is to
recognize and fix your mistakes.
You're always doing the right thing.

Thanks, but best not to overestimate me. If I blunder, I need
you to tell me right away.
I'll try to be careful.

That was not directed at you. Still, nothing better than walking 
the straight and narrow.
You're a stand-up Digimon, you know that?

I am merely saying what a warrior should. Still, I will try to 
live up to those words.

Am I cool or what? I hear there's different types of coolness,
though, so what kind am I?
The wild kind of cool.

Hehehe... I knew it! And I'm going to show everyone I don't just
look wild, I AM wild!
The smart kind of cool.

Well, I'll be. You're really observant. My true charm is in how
much I know!
The reliable kind of cool.

The cool have a different kind of heart, huh? Don't worry. I'll
never turn on you!
The lovable kind of cool.

L-Lovable...? Ugh, come on! Here I am, all embarrassed, but
my tail won't stop wagging!
I would like to get to know individuals who pray for peace.
I'd like to be one of them.

To wish for peace is the first step toward action. Let us walk 
this path together.
Count me out.

Do not make this more complicated than it has to be. 
Surely you, too, desire peace.
Get to know me better, then!

I believe you have what it takes to join me in aspiring for 
peace. I believe in you.
A wonderful thing to aspire to.

Do not talk as if this has nothing to do with you. I wish to 
know you more than anyone.
I pledge fealty to you, my liege.
Counting on it!

I wish for us to fight for justice together, so it is I who am
counting on you.
What are we gonna do?

Defend all that is good in the Digital World. I should like to hear 
your thoughts as well.
I want us to be equals.

You are a truly humble human. Even as equals, I would endeavor 
to follow your lead.
I feel a sense of duty now.
And it is that sincerity that drew me to you. Let us smite evil together.
These jeans are pretty sick, aren't they?
They look good on you, yeah.

Right? With the good mood they put me in, my kicks and jumps 
are sharper than ever.
That skull's a little creepy.

It's a message to my foes that I'm coming for their head. 
Psyches 'em out before the fight.
Talk about bad taste.

Dissing my fashion sense? Given the type of stuff I get up to, 
I'd say it's on point.
I think you've got a rip there?

They're called "distressed jeans." A human like you should know 
how dope these are.
What value is there in us spending time together?
Value has nothing to do with it.

Hehe... My, you do have pluck. I'll allow you to spend a little
more time with me as a treat.
You could learn something.

Hmph. I don't normally notice ants like you.
All the more reason to observe you up close?
We can become friends.

I don't need friends. Still, you're quite intriguing.
I suppose I could spend some time with you.
I wanna save you.

Hmph! Such drivel! But still... Perhaps I will observe you a little
longer.
If you spot a shiny afterimage, it might be me, you know!
You move at light speed?

That's only the speed of my movement. My intense zeal 
gushes out faster than light!
I've never seen one.

Even an afterimage would be hard to spot. Such is the speed 
afforded by Omni inForce.
I'd love to see that!

If you can handle me and my intense zeal, then you'll see it 
for certain!
You might be too fast to see.

If you want to catch sight of me, I can slow down a little.
Just a tick, though.

Foes employ craven tactics at times. What should I do if a 
friend is taken hostage?
Cowards deserve a boot to the face!

Hahaha! Couldn't have put it better myself! Drive your courage 
down those evildoers' throats!
Fool your foes with deceptive strategies.

Oh, that's a pretty cool idea. If all went well, no one would 
even need to get hurt.
Set up a one-two punch with your pals!

Good call! No matter how far apart they are, real friends are 
one in mind and heart!
I'll take the hostage's place.

Take their place? Like a hostage exchange? Wow... Such a 
kind answer suits you well.

Sometimes I think I'm so strong, it's scary. Is it all right for me 
to have such power?
I want you to have that power.

You trust I won't do anything dumb with it? I'll use it with a valiant 
heart, then.
Power is all about how you use it.

You mean the right way to wield it? I'll take a page out of my 
ancestors' book, then.
Your friends will always keep you in check.

You're right. I'm not alone. Well, if I ever lose myself... I'll be 
counting on you, then.
I'll always be by your side.

All right, then. If you're with me, I know I'll keep using this 
power for good.
Destruction or rebirth? That is the question.
Destruction.

Destroying is easy with my might. I must give due consideration
to what else can be done.
What's this all about?

The foes that surround us, and this world. There are many
questions that need resolving.
Rebirth.

Rebirth can only follow destruction. If you can bear this truth,
let us move forward.
Both are important.

They are the two forces that stabilize this world. Let us sculpt
the future together.

Do not be mistaken. My form is not all that is large about me! 
You understand, yes?
Your strong heart is also jumbo size.
You know me well. I have a vast heart, fit for this immense body!
Your intellect is just as massive.

Precisely. This frame houses not only strength but knowledge of 
all things as well.
Size differences aside, our bond is huge.

Though you are small, I acknowledge your strength. Our bond of 
friendship is firm.
Your love is so big, it makes me dizzy.

The size of my love surpasses that of this body. Fear not. I shall 
always keep you safe.

I would like a role when I fight together with everyone. What 
part should I play?
Lead the charge!

A role suited to my gallantry! I shall cleave a path for my 
compatriots to follow.
Command from behind.

A role suited to my perspicacity! My precise instructions shall 
guide our way to victory.
Support our allies.

A role suited to my support prowess! I shall ensure that everyone 
can act to their fullest.
I'll trust you to guard my rear.

You would trust me to such an extent?! Of course! Consider your 
back unassailable!
I shall rule over Gaia!
Is that even possible?

You'll know once I've put my strength on display. I'll show you 
everything I've got!
How would you even do it?

I have the might of the nine dragon veins. See for yourself what 
that power amounts to!
You can do it!

But of course! Watch me add the power of eight dragon veins
to my own might!
I'd like to help.

I appreciate it, but I have the nine dragon veins on my side. 
That's more than enough!
You should envy my strength.
Oh, I'm green with envy.

Kekeke... Good answer. Wallow in that envy! Until the day 
I devour the Digital World...
Are you strong enough to warrant envy?

Kekeke... Such dreadful ignorance. You'll understand 
everything the day I consume you.
There's no point. You're just too strong.

Kekeke... That works for me. Let's see if you end up fawning 
over me or worshipping me.
Far from it. I think it's great!

Kekeke... If you can't beat them, join them, right? I'll pull 
you into the fold, then.
Which would you rather deal with, scorching heat, or bitter cold?
Scorching heat!

To choose the lick of flame over piercing chill—that is some 
respectable resolve.
Bitter cold...

One can hardly resist flame, but a certain determination is needed 
to endure the cold.
It's all the same to me.

Resigned to either fate, are you? There is something noble 
about that. Not bad.
Can I say neither?

I would call that a natural human reaction. Worry not. I shall
protect you from both.

Tell me the first word that pops into your head when you hear 
the word "metal."
Hard!

I'm quite proud of my smooth moves, despite all this hard
armor. Watch! I'll get your blood pumping.
Machine!

True. I'm basically a walking, talking, weapon-toting machine.
We should count up all my weapons sometime.
Cold!

I may breathe out absolute-zero blasts, but my body and soul 
are always burning hot.
Sturdy?

Sure, though I protected my friends with my sturdy body even 
before I got this metal.
I'm dangerous in this form. You shouldn't get too close...
I can tell just by looking at you.

Then I suggest you step back. My planet-class energy is nothing 
to make light of.
What's so dangerous about you?

My abilities have been fully released. This planet-class energy 
could destroy everything.
I wasn't planning on it, anyway.

I'm glad. Once I've done what I have to do and canceled 
Burst Mode, let's meet again.
Even so, I still wanna be by your side.

Please don't upset me. I don't want my planet-class energy 
to cause you any harm...
I'll show you what the speed of light truly looks like.
I'd love to see that!

I'd be surprised if you could even see my afterimage. I shoot up 
to high altitude fast.
You move at light speed?

Actually, I fly at subluminal speed. Not much different, in the 
grand scheme of things.
I bet watching would make me queasy.

Staring at flickering light is bad for human eyes. No need to 
push yourself like that.
I bet it's really bright.

When battle begins, a dazzling flash darts across the sky. 
That lets you know I'm here.
I don't need any armor to fight!
You look light on your feet.

That's right. I'm way faster than I was with the armor 
attached—faster than light, even!
What about your weapons?

The armor was fine but speed's always been my greatest 
weapon—especially my bands of light.
I believe you.

Thank you. I can do anything with the faith of my friends. 
Watch my superluminal speed!
Isn't that dangerous?

Shedding my armor doesn't mean I'm unarmed. I'm so fast 
you won't have time to worry!
...Can't you feel it? The vast energy crackling through the air?
I wish I could.

Behold my dark purple aura. Perhaps then will you come to sense 
this abundant energy.
Can't feel it at all.

Is it futile for humans? You should be able to see it, though. 
It's my dark purple aura.
Oh, I feel it.

That shouldn't be possible for humans, but if you say so, I'll 
believe you.
I'll pass on feeling it.

Are you afraid of being overwhelmed by this energy? Don't 
worry. I can control it.
Are there any evildoers afoot?
There might be.

Then you and I, Gallantmon, must root them out and mete justice
upon their wicked souls!
I don't know.

Then a thorough investigation is in order. None may escape
Gallantmon's keen gaze.
There are.

Then I, Gallantmon, shall deliver punishment forthwith. And
you shall be at my side!
Nope.

I am glad. I, Gallantmon, will brook not even the tiniest of misdeeds! 
Peace must be kept!

Now that I possess wings and crimson armor, I, Gallantmon,
am invincible!
You do look pretty strong.

With my full power unleashed, I, Gallantmon, am most assuredly
mighty.
You must be hot in all that.

My crimson armor is evidence of the burning power surging
within me.
I like the old Gallantmon better.

Such might cannot persist forever. Like it or no, I will revert to
my former self in time.
I hope you stay like this forever.

Sadly, as my power wanes, I will revert to my old form. I must
shine bright while I can!
Once you fall, the dark and gloom are not so bad.
I'm disappointed in you.

Say what you will, but I, ChaosGallantmon, shall bring disaster 
upon the Digital World!
Do you do bad things?

Of course. The instincts of ChaosGallantmon compel me to
bring about calamity and ruin.
Don't do anything bad.

Friend or no, ChaosGallantmon cannot comply. My instincts
compel me to summon calamity.
That doesn't suit you.

It may not now, but soon the darkness will claim I, ChaosGallantmon. 
You shall see.
Do you know of the Digital World in another dimension?
What kind of world is it?

An immature world on the road to ruin, unable to protect itself 
from outside invaders.
I don't get what you mean.

The Digital World you know is not the only one out there. 
There are others, you know.
I know about it.

Then you must know of me as well: MedievalGallantmon, 
the Whirlwind General.
Never heard of it.

It is called "Witchelny." It is my beloved world, although its 
magic is still somewhat unrefined.
I am loath to stand revealed before a human as I am now...
I wanna see more of you.

I suppose there is no harm. But know that you are the first
human to view me this closely.
I wanna see you fight.

My battles are not for amusement, and your eyes would 
perceive but a moment regardless.
Okay. I won't stare.

Most considerate, for a human. If only all holy warriors 
were like you.
I'll pretend I never saw you.

The past can only rarely be undone, but as it is you who saw
me, I am not overly troubled.

Now that I am a sword, the entirety of my combat ability is 
devoted solely to offense!
How did you end up like that?

A miraculous Digivolution only possible through Alphamon's 
magic circle of DigiCode.
Are you Alphamon?

I am not Alphamon, but formerly Ouryumon. Through
Digivolution, I am now Alphamon's blade.
Can I wield you?

Only Alphamon may wield me. It is impossible for any other 
Digimon, much less a human.
Sorry you got turned into a sword.

It is nothing to be sorry about. This form is the greatest honor 
for a Prototype Digimon.

I have my own system of justice. And I refuse to engage in 
debate about it.
That doesn't seem right.

What did I just say? Still, I suppose you're free to have 
whatever opinion you like.
Your way of thinking is wrong.

What did I just say? Say whatever you want. Your opinions 
are all just nonsense to me.
You're right to think that way.

I don't remember asking your opinion. Still, at least you're 
not trying to argue.
I guess that's one way to think of things.

And what other way is there? I don't condone insolence, but 
I admit I care what you think.
I will gladly lay down my life for my liege.
Even if your liege is evil?

Good or evil is for my liege to decide. I merely serve my liege 
to the end.
That's crazy talk.

I am not telling you to lay down your life. You need but act on 
your own beliefs.
Good for you.

Many humans do not understand, but it seems you do. I see us 
having a lasting friendship.
You should value your life more.

While your concern for my well-being gladdens me, my liege 
comes before all.
Strategy is everything when it comes to controlling a battle.
My strategies are better.
Superior to mine? Interesting... Let us see what you can do, then.
It takes more than strategy to win.

The excuse of one who lacks strategic vision. I shall prove how
wrong you are soon enough.
Oh, yeah? Tell me about your strategies...

Well, for instance—Wait! I nearly revealed my hand. I shall have
to be more guarded...
Whatever your strategy is, count me in.

Agreeing without knowing the details is foolish, but you are right
to trust me.

My combat abilities, too, are without flaw. You may entrust
everything to me.
No, thanks.

Such bravado gains you nothing. You should at least observe
my excellence in combat first.
All right. Then, prove it.

I dislike being spoken down to, but you will change your tone
once you see me in action.
I'll be counting on you.

A wise decision. You will not be sorry. Be thankful that you have 
good allies.
You're really sure of yourself, huh?

I have both a strategic mind and the combat prowess to back
it up. You must respect that.

Illuminating all of the darkness with holy light! That is my
mission!
Yes, please do.

This is all for the Digital World. I shall not allow any evil to lurk
in the shadows!
Man, that's bright.

On the contrary, my light is still lacking. Please tell me
wherever darkness may hide.
Let's shine that light together.

Please leave this to me. You lack technique suitable for the
task.
You can't illuminate all the darkness.

I shall. I must! I cannot allow my friends to be swallowed by 
the shadows!
None can surpass my divine swiftness.
I can do it with super divine swiftness.

There is no such thing. Word games and wild delusions will 
not work with me.
I want divine swiftness so I can keep up.

Dreams, hopes and goals are good, but we shall see if the
human mind can match my speed.
Nothing could ever be faster.

Ah, so you understand. Strive to improve, but also know 
your limitations.
I'm not trying to compete with you.

Giving up without a fight? Yet it was not my intent to make
you yield. Let us be friends.
Desire stirs all to action. Human, unleash your greed!
No one's greedier than me.

You suggest your greed could surpass that of an Evil King? 
Then let desire rule the day!
I rein in my desires.

There is no need for self-restraint. Come, now. Show me your 
unabashed greed!
Greed isn't healthy.

Is that sarcasm? It will be amusing to see which of us
succumbs to greed first.
I don't desire anything.

Impossible. One day I shall bring forth the greed buried deep 
within your heart!
Just leave me alone. I don't work well with others.
Aw, don't go. I'll miss you.

I didn't say I was leaving. I'll be right here, so no need to be
sad.
But I wanna talk to you sometimes.
Fine, as long as you tell me something I don't already know.
I wanna be friends.

I'm not saying I don't like you. I just don't want to team up 
with anyone.
I wanna know all about you.

You're a weird human... But we don't need to team up for you 
to learn about me.
Don't be so scared. I hardly ever get angry.
I wanna see what you look like angry.
The only time anyone sees me angry is right before they die.
Okay, then smile.
I do if I have a reason to. So come on. Try and make me laugh.
I wanna try to make you mad.
Not possible, mainly because I like you.
But you look cool when you're angry.

You got the wrong idea. No one who sees me angry lives to
talk about it.
Are you willing to fall from grace with me?
I'd like to give it a shot.

You understand what it means to fall with me, don't you? 
Be sure you're prepared.
Oh, I'm already there.

...I'm not sure what that means, but perhaps you should 
re-examine yourself a bit more?
Let's aspire to greater things, together.

If you mean to reach greater heights through nefarious 
means, then I'm here for it.
Don't misjudge me, now.
Hohoho! I love it when humans put up a brave front like that.

Are you the one who woke me from my thousand-year
slumber?!
No.

Who woke me doesn't matter right now, but be prepared,
because I always get my revenge.
If it upsets you, why not go back to sleep?

I never thought of that... Whether it works or not, it's worth a
try.
What if I am?

Normally I'd destroy you, but I'm still too drowsy. So you're
off the hook for now.
Yeah.

It doesn't feel like it's been a thousand years yet. I'd like to sleep 
a little longer.
Zzz... *snore*
Wow, talk about loud snoring!
Hey...! Be quiet or you'll be in for it... Zzz...
Probably a grumpy riser, so I'll leave it be.
Wha—?! ...Oh. Guess it's not time to wake up yet... Zzz...
It's sleeping so peacefully. I'll be quiet.
Zzz... Zzz... *mumble*
I'll plug its nose to stop the snoring.
*snort* Huh? *snort* Huh?! Zzz...
Would you like to seal me away?
Yes, I would.

You certainly are candid... Still, that is impossible. I am merely 
a shadow of Lucemon.
I honestly don't know.
Go and revisit the ancient texts. It is up to you to believe them or not.
I want you to be my friend.

You would entice me, who bears the Crowns of the Deadly Sins? 
Let us see where this goes.
How could I possibly?

Of course, it is beyond your capabilities. Still, our current 
coexistence is fine by me.
My courage is a blazing inferno!
Let it blaze even hotter.

Say no more. My courage is gonna blaze right there alongside
my flames!
Why so much courage?

Because I've got the Digi-Egg of Courage. But I'd be full of courage 
even without it!
I think it's blazing a little too hot.

Oops. Really? Sometimes I don't catch that on my own, so thanks 
for telling me.
I feel brave now, too.
So I set your courage ablaze, too? Guess we're the ultimate team!
Do you want to climb aboard me and travel the world?
Maybe just a little.

Curious but timid, eh? No need to commit right now. 
Just get ready for a long journey!
No, thanks.

I had not thought you so cautious. They do say it is better to 
act than worry, you know.
I'm not looking to die.

Human or no, I would not let a friend die. You will not perish 
while astride my back.
I'd love to!

Understood. Though I cannot take you now, I vow to fulfill 
my promise before you die.
